info.name: Acuity Sandbox (ClearValue)
info.description: Live-test harness for Acuity/ClearValue integration. Fill in the 'Acuity Sandbox' environment with values from ClearValue before running.

body.raw:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<AcuityOrder xmlns="http://www.acuityexchange.com/schemas/v6.4.0" SchemaVersion="6.4.0">
  <MessageHeader>
    <MessageID>{{$guid}}</MessageID>
    <SentDateTime>{{$isoTimestamp}}</SentDateTime>
    <SenderID>{{senderId}}</SenderID>
    <RecipientID>{{recipientId}}</RecipientID>
  </MessageHeader>
  <OrderDetails>
    <PartnerReferenceNumber>{{partnerRef}}</PartnerReferenceNumber>
    <ProductCode>{{productCode}}</ProductCode>
  </OrderDetails>
  <Loan>
    <LoanNumber>TEST-LOAN-001</LoanNumber>
    <LoanType>Conventional</LoanType>
    <LoanPurpose>Purchase</LoanPurpose>
  </Loan>
  <SubjectProperty>
    <Address1>123 Test St</Address1>
    <City>Columbus</City>
    <State>OH</State>
    <PostalCode>43215</PostalCode>
    <PropertyType>SingleFamily</PropertyType>
    <SalesPrice>450000</SalesPrice>
  </SubjectProperty>
  <Contacts>
    <Contact ContactType="Borrower">
      <FirstName>Test</FirstName>
      <LastName>Borrower</LastName>
      <DaytimePhone>6145551234</DaytimePhone>
    </Contact>
  </Contacts>
</AcuityOrder>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<AcuityCancellation xmlns="http://www.acuityexchange.com/schemas/v6.4.0" SchemaVersion="6.4.0">
  <MessageHeader>
    <MessageID>{{$guid}}</MessageID>
    <SentDateTime>{{$isoTimestamp}}</SentDateTime>
    <SenderID>{{senderId}}</SenderID>
    <RecipientID>{{recipientId}}</RecipientID>
  </MessageHeader>
  <CancellationDetails>
    <PartnerReferenceNumber>{{partnerRef}}</PartnerReferenceNumber>
    <Reason>Test cancellation from Postman</Reason>
  </CancellationDetails>
</AcuityCancellation>
